Metadata.title: LumenLingo — Master Languages Through Immersive Experiences
Metadata.description: Download LumenLingo, the premium language learning app for iPhone. Beautiful flashcards, adaptive practice, ambient soundscapes, and more. Free on the App Store.

Hero.headline: Master Languages <gradient>Through Immersive</gradient> Experiences
Hero.subheadline: A visual journey through language learning. Beautiful flashcards, ambient soundscapes, and breathing exercises — designed to make every session feel like a meditation.

FeatureShowcase.heading: Everything You Need to Master a New Language
FeatureShowcase.description: Six powerful pillars designed to transform how you learn, practice, and retain new languages.
FeatureShowcase.immersiveFlashcardsDesc: Beautifully designed cards with spaced repetition, swipe gestures, and visual feedback that makes memorisation feel effortless.
FeatureShowcase.smartPracticeDesc: Three distinct modes — multiple choice, word builder, and grammar quizzes — that adapt to your level and keep you engaged.
FeatureShowcase.richSoundscapesDesc: 12 ambient environments — from tropical rain to deep space — that reduce anxiety and boost focus during study sessions.
FeatureShowcase.breathingOrbsDesc: Guided breathing exercises with mesmerising visual orbs that calm the mind before or between practice sessions.
FeatureShowcase.languagePairsDesc: Learn in any direction across 9 languages. Study Spanish from English, Japanese from German, or any combination.
FeatureShowcase.progressTrackingDesc: Detailed analytics, daily streaks, XP milestones, and mastery indicators that show exactly how far you've come.

ScreenshotGallery.heading: Designed to Inspire
ScreenshotGallery.description: Every screen crafted with intention. Swipe through and see the attention to detail that makes LumenLingo unique.

Differentiators.heading: Why LumenLingo?
Differentiators.description: More than a language app — it's a mindful learning experience designed to be as beautiful as it is effective.
Differentiators.designDesc: Every pixel crafted with care. Dark-mode-first, silk-smooth animations, and a cosmic aesthetic that makes learning feel premium.
Differentiators.environmentsDesc: 12 unique soundscapes and animated backgrounds transform your study session into a meditative retreat.
Differentiators.practiceModesDesc: Flashcards, grammar quizzes, and word builder — each with unique mechanics, visual feedback, and adaptive difficulty.
Differentiators.mindfulnessDesc: Breathing orbs, ambient sounds, and calming visuals reduce anxiety and create the perfect headspace for learning.

CTA.heading: Start Your Language Journey <gradient>Today</gradient>
CTA.description: Download LumenLingo free on the App Store. Premium tiers available for serious learners.

Pricing.heading: Choose Your Learning Journey
Pricing.description: Start for free, upgrade when you're ready. Every tier builds on the last, so you never lose access to core features.
Pricing.trialBadge: Try Royal-level access free for 14 days

comparison.heading: Compare All Features
comparison.description: Every tier builds on the one before it. Higher tiers include all features from lower tiers.

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Everything you need to know about LumenLingo's pricing and subscriptions.

Features.heading: Crafted for Serious Learners
Features.description: Every feature in LumenLingo is designed with cognitive science in mind. From spaced repetition to ambient immersion, discover what makes learning with us different.

walkthroughs.heading: See it in action
walkthroughs.description: Three core experiences that define the LumenLingo journey.

languagePairs.heading: Language Pairs
languagePairs.description: Learn in any direction. Hover any card to see a sample flashcard.
languagePairs.comingSoonDesc: More languages and pairs are on the way. Join early access to be the first to know.

About.heading: About LumenShore
About.description: The story behind the app, what drives us, and where we're headed.

values.beautyDesc: We believe tools for the mind should be beautiful. Every pixel, every animation, every interaction is designed to delight.
values.scienceDesc: Spaced repetition, active recall, and interleaving — grounded in decades of cognitive science research.
values.privacyDesc: Your data stays on your device and in your iCloud. We don't sell data, track behaviour, or serve ads.
values.accessibleDesc: Full VoiceOver support, Dynamic Type, and Reduce Motion. Language learning should be for everyone.

timeline.sparkDesc: LumenShore was founded with a simple belief: language learning apps can be beautiful, mindful, and effective — all at once.
timeline.betaDesc: The first version of LumenLingo shipped to beta testers. Flashcards, soundscapes, and the core learning loop took shape.
timeline.launchDesc: LumenLingo launched worldwide on the App Store with 9 languages, 25+ pairs, and a five-tier membership model.
timeline.growingDesc: New languages, new features, and a growing community of learners discovering a more beautiful way to learn.

Contact.heading: Have a question?
Contact.description: Can't find what you're looking for in the FAQ? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.faqDescription: Quick answers to the most common questions about LumenLingo.

Download.heading: LumenLingo

benefits.flashcardsDesc: Swipe-based cards with stunning visuals and spaced repetition built in.

benefits.soundscapesDesc: 12 immersive environments that transform your study sessions.

Download.upgradeNote: Free to start. Pro, Elite, and Royal tiers available in-app.

meta.title: Privacy Policy
meta.description: Read how LumenShore handles your data with care. Learn about our privacy-first approach, on-device processing, iCloud sync, and your rights under GDPR and CCPA.

hero.heading: Privacy Policy
hero.subtitle: Your privacy matters deeply to us. Here's exactly how we handle your data — in plain English, not legal jargon.

overview.heading: Overview
overview.p1: LumenShore Ltd (“LumenShore”, “we”, “us”, or “our”) operates the LumenLingo mobile application (“the App”). This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, store, and protect information when you use LumenLingo.
overview.p2: We built LumenLingo with a privacy-first architecture. Your learning data is processed and stored on your device and in your personal iCloud account — not on our servers. We believe your data is yours, and it should stay that way.

informationWeCollect.heading: Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.intro: LumenLingo collects minimal data necessary to provide a great learning experience:
informationWeCollect.li1: Learning progress data — flashcard mastery levels, practice scores, streaks, XP, and session history. This data is stored locally on your device and synced via iCloud.
informationWeCollect.li2: App preferences — your selected language pairs, soundscape preferences, visual background choices, and tier selection. Stored on-device and synced via iCloud.
informationWeCollect.li3: Subscription status — your membership tier, managed entirely by Apple through the App Store. We receive a subscription status from Apple but do not process payment information.
informationWeCollect.li4: Anonymous analytics — we may collect aggregated, non-identifiable usage metrics (such as which features are most popular) to improve the app. No personal data is included.

whatWeDontCollect.heading: What We Don't Collect
whatWeDontCollect.intro: We want to be clear about what we never collect:
whatWeDontCollect.li1: No email addresses, names, or personal identifiers (the app doesn't require account registration)
whatWeDontCollect.li2: No location data or GPS coordinates
whatWeDontCollect.li3: No contacts, photos, or access to other apps on your device
whatWeDontCollect.li4: No payment or credit card information (Apple handles all billing)
whatWeDontCollect.li5: No advertising identifiers or tracking pixels
whatWeDontCollect.li6: No data sold or shared with third-party advertisers — ever

howWeUse.heading: How We Use Your Information
howWeUse.intro: The limited data we handle is used solely to:
howWeUse.li1: Personalise your learning — spaced repetition scheduling, difficulty adaptation, and progress tracking depend on your learning history.
howWeUse.li2: Sync your progress — iCloud sync ensures your data follows you across all your Apple devices.
howWeUse.li3: Manage your subscription — we verify your membership tier to unlock the appropriate features.
howWeUse.li4: Improve the app — anonymous aggregate data helps us understand which features are valuable and where to focus development.

dataStorage.heading: Data Storage & Security
dataStorage.intro: LumenLingo uses a privacy-first, on-device architecture:
dataStorage.li1: On-device storage — all learning data is stored locally using Apple's SwiftData framework, protected by your device's built-in encryption.
dataStorage.li2: iCloud sync — data syncs between your devices via your personal iCloud account, encrypted end-to-end by Apple. We do not have access to your iCloud data.
dataStorage.li3: No external servers — LumenLingo does not maintain servers that store your personal data. There is no cloud database for us to secure (or breach).
dataStorage.li4: App Store security — subscription management is handled by Apple's secure infrastructure.

thirdParty.heading: Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: LumenLingo integrates with a limited number of third-party services:
thirdParty.li1: Apple App Store — for app distribution, subscription management, and payment processing. Subject to Apple's Privacy Policy.
thirdParty.li2: Apple iCloud — for data synchronisation across devices. Subject to Apple's iCloud terms.
thirdParty.li3: Privacy-respecting analytics — if we use analytics, we use cookie-free, GDPR-compliant tools that collect no personally identifiable information.
thirdParty.noAdNetworks: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook SDK, or any advertising networks.

childrensPrivacy.heading: Children's Privacy
childrensPrivacy.p1: LumenLingo is designed for users of all ages and does not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13 (or the applicable age in your jurisdiction). Since the app does not require account registration and stores data locally, no personal information is transmitted to us from any user, including children.
childrensPrivacy.p2: Parents and guardians can manage or delete the app and its data at any time through standard iOS device management.

dataRetention.heading: Data Retention & Deletion
dataRetention.intro: Since your data lives on your device and in your iCloud account, you have complete control over it:
dataRetention.li1: Reset progress — use the in-app Settings → Reset Progress option to clear all learning data.
dataRetention.li2: Delete the app — uninstalling LumenLingo removes all locally stored data.
dataRetention.li3: iCloud data — you can manage iCloud storage through your device's Settings → Apple ID → iCloud → Manage Storage.
dataRetention.li4: Subscription — cancel your subscription through Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions. No data is retained by us after cancellation.

yourRights.heading: Your Rights
yourRights.intro: Depending on your location, you may have additional rights regarding your data:
yourRights.gdprLi1: Right to access your data — your data is already on your device and iCloud.
yourRights.gdprLi2: Right to rectification — you can edit your preferences directly in the app.
yourRights.gdprLi3: Right to erasure — reset progress or delete the app to remove all data.
yourRights.gdprLi4: Right to data portability — your data is stored in standard formats in iCloud.
yourRights.gdprLi5: Right to object — contact us to opt out of anonymous analytics.
yourRights.ccpaLi1: Right to know what data is collected — detailed above; we collect minimal data.
yourRights.ccpaLi2: Right to delete — reset progress or delete the app.
yourRights.ccpaLi3: Right to opt out — we do not sell personal information to anyone.
yourRights.ccpaLi4: Non-discrimination — you will not be treated differently for exercising your rights.

policyUpdates.heading: Policy Updates
policyUpdates.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time, typically to reflect changes in the app's features or legal requirements. When we make significant changes, we'll update the “Last updated” date at the top of this page.
policyUpdates.p2: We encourage you to review this page periodically. Continued use of LumenLingo after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

contactUs.heading: Contact Us
contactUs.intro: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, your data, or want to exercise your rights, please reach out:

meta.title: Terms of Service
meta.description: Terms of Service for LumenLingo. Understand your rights and responsibilities when using our language-learning app — written in plain English.

hero.heading: Terms of Service
hero.subtitle: The rules of the road for using LumenLingo — written simply, because legal documents shouldn't need a dictionary.

introduction.heading: Introduction
introduction.p1: Welcome to LumenLingo. These Terms of Service (“Terms”) govern your use of the LumenLingo mobile application (“the App”) operated by LumenShore Ltd (“LumenShore”, “we”, “us”, or “our”).
introduction.p2: By downloading, installing, or using LumenLingo, you agree to be bound by these Terms. If you don't agree with any part of these Terms, please don't use the App.

acceptance.heading: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.intro: By accessing or using LumenLingo, you confirm that:
acceptance.li1: You are at least 13 years old (or the minimum age required in your jurisdiction).
acceptance.li2: If you are under 18, you have obtained consent from a parent or legal guardian.
acceptance.li3: You have the legal capacity to enter into a binding agreement.
acceptance.li4: You will comply with these Terms and all applicable laws.

yourAccount.heading: Your Account
yourAccount.intro: LumenLingo does not require traditional account registration. Your identity within the App is tied to your Apple ID and device. You are responsible for:
yourAccount.li1: Maintaining the security of your Apple ID and device access.
yourAccount.li2: All activity that occurs through your use of the App.
yourAccount.li3: Keeping your device's operating system updated for the best experience and security.

subscriptions.heading: Subscriptions & Billing
subscriptions.intro: LumenLingo offers free and premium membership tiers. Premium features require a paid subscription.
subscriptions.li1: Billing — all subscriptions are processed and managed by Apple through the App Store. We do not handle payments directly.
subscriptions.li2: Free tier — provides access to core learning features with limited language pairs and practice modes.
subscriptions.li3: Premium tiers — unlock additional language pairs, unlimited practice, soundscapes, breathing orbs, and other premium features as described in the App.
subscriptions.li4: Auto-renewal — subscriptions auto-renew unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the end of the current billing period.
subscriptions.li5: Cancellation — you can cancel your subscription at any time through your Apple ID Settings → Subscriptions. Cancellation takes effect at the end of your current billing period.
subscriptions.li6: Refunds — refund requests are handled by Apple in accordance with their refund policies. Contact Apple Support for refund enquiries.
subscriptions.li7: Price changes — we may adjust subscription prices. You will be notified in advance, and changes apply only to your next renewal period.

acceptableUse.heading: Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.intro: You agree to use LumenLingo only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms. You must not:
acceptableUse.li1: Reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the App.
acceptableUse.li2: Attempt to access, tamper with, or use non-public areas of the App or its systems.
acceptableUse.li3: Copy, modify, distribute, or create derivative works based on the App.
acceptableUse.li4: Use the App in any way that could damage, disable, overburden, or impair its functionality.
acceptableUse.li5: Use automated scripts, bots, or other tools to interact with the App.
acceptableUse.li6: Attempt to circumvent subscription or tier restrictions.

intellectualProperty.heading: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.p1: All content within LumenLingo — including but not limited to flashcard content, translations, audio, soundscapes, visual designs, shader effects, animations, the LumenLingo name, and the LumenShore brand — is the intellectual property of LumenShore Ltd and is protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.
intellectualProperty.p2: Your subscription grants you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable licence to use the App for personal, non-commercial language-learning purposes. This licence does not include the right to:
intellectualProperty.li1: Reproduce, distribute, or publicly display any App content.
intellectualProperty.li2: Use any content for commercial purposes or in competing products.
intellectualProperty.li3: Remove or alter any proprietary notices or labels.

userContent.heading: User Content & Data
userContent.p1: Your learning data (progress, preferences, practice history) is stored on your device and in your personal iCloud account. LumenShore does not claim ownership of your personal learning data.
userContent.p2: For more details on how we handle data, please review our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.

disclaimers.heading: Disclaimers
disclaimers.intro: LumenLingo is provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis. While we strive for accuracy and quality, we make no warranties, expressed or implied, regarding:
disclaimers.li1: The accuracy or completeness of any language content or translations.
disclaimers.li2: Uninterrupted or error-free operation of the App.
disclaimers.li3: The results you may achieve from using the App.
disclaimers.li4: The availability of specific features at any given time.
disclaimers.supplement: LumenLingo is a supplementary learning tool. It is not a substitute for professional language instruction, certified translation services, or academic coursework.

limitationOfLiability.heading: Limitation of Liability
limitationOfLiability.intro: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, LumenShore Ltd shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, or any loss of profits, data, or goodwill arising from:
limitationOfLiability.li1: Your use of (or inability to use) the App.
limitationOfLiability.li2: Any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in the content.
limitationOfLiability.li3: Unauthorised access to your device or data (not caused by our negligence).
limitationOfLiability.li4: Any interruption or cessation of the service.
limitationOfLiability.cap: Our total liability for any claim arising from these Terms or your use of LumenLingo shall not exceed the amount you paid for the App in the 12 months preceding the claim.

termination.heading: Termination
termination.p1: You may stop using LumenLingo at any time by deleting the App. Your subscription, if active, should be cancelled separately through Apple's subscription management.
termination.p2: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate access to the App if we reasonably believe you have violated these Terms. In the event of termination:
termination.li1: Your licence to use the App is immediately revoked.
termination.li2: Your local data remains on your device until you choose to delete it.
termination.li3: Active subscriptions should be cancelled through Apple.
termination.li4: Provisions that by their nature should survive termination will remain in effect.

governingLaw.heading: Governing Law
governingLaw.p1: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of England and Wales, without regard to conflict of law principles.
governingLaw.p2: Any disputes arising from these Terms shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of England and Wales. However, this does not affect your statutory rights as a consumer in your country of residence.

changes.heading: Changes to These Terms
changes.p1: We may update these Terms from time to time. When we make significant changes, we'll update the “Last updated” date at the top and may notify you through the App.
changes.p2: Continued use of LumenLingo after changes are posted constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms. If you disagree with the changes, please stop using the App and cancel any active subscription.

contactUs.heading: Contact Us
contactUs.intro: If you have questions about these Terms or need to report a concern, please contact us:
